text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) سَأَلَنِي ابْنُ شُبْرُمَةَ مَا تَقُولُ فِي الْقَسَامَةِ فِي الدَّمِ فَأَجَبْتُهُ بِمَا صَنَعَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ أَ رَأَيْتَ لَوْ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَمْ يَصْنَعْ هَكَذَا كَيْفَ كَانَ الْقَوْلُ فِيهِ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ أَمَّا مَا صَنَعَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَدْ أَخْبَرْتُكَ بِهِ وَ أَمَّا مَا لَمْ يَصْنَعْ فَلَا عِلْمَ لِي بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie, from hanan Bin Sudeyr who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said to me<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Ibn Shabrama asked me<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What are you<sup>asws</sup> saying regarding the compurgation (sworn endorsements) with regards to the blood?’ So I<sup>asws</sup> answered him: ‘With what the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> dealt with’. So he said, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view if the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> had not done it like this, how would have been the word (of judgement) with regards to it?’ So I<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘As far as what the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> did do, so I<sup>asws</sup> have informed you of it; and as for what he<sup>saww</sup> did not do, so there is no knowledge for me<sup>asws</sup> of it’.
